# Staffing Plan

## Staffing Strategy

UBUNIFU SACCO follows a lean, high-performance staffing model with a core team of permanent staff supplemented by contract and field staff.

## Staffing Schedule

| Role | Phase 1 | Phase 2 | Phase 3 | Type |
|---|---|---|---|---|
| CEO | 1 | 1 | 1 | Permanent |
| CTO | 1 | 1 | 1 | Permanent |
| CFO | 1 | 1 | 1 | Permanent |
| Credit Manager | 1 | 1 | 1 | Permanent |
| IT Officers | 1 | 2 | 2 | Permanent |
| Field Officers | 2 | 4 | 6 | Permanent |
| Finance Officers | 1 | 2 | 2 | Permanent |
| Customer Service | 1 | 2 | 3 | Permanent |
| Community Agents | 50 | 100 | 200 | Contract |
| **Total FTEs** | **9** | **14** | **17** | |

## Recruitment Policy
- Open, competitive recruitment for all positions
- 60% women target in management roles
- Youth (under 35) preferred for field and technology roles
- All staff must pass background and credit checks
